nasb.text: As often as it passes through, it will seize you; For morning after morning it will pass through, anytime during the day or night, And it will be sheer terror to understand what it means.”

esv.text: As often as it passes through it will take you; for morning by morning it will pass through, by day and by night; and it will be sheer terror to understand the message.

cnv.text: 每次掃過的時候，都把你們抓去； 因為每早晨它必漫過，白天與黑夜也是這樣； 人若明白所傳的，必受驚恐。

ccb.text: 灾难必不分昼夜、日复一日地扫过， 每次扫过都必将你们掳去。” 明白这信息的人都必惊恐万分。

csbs.text: 每当它经过时，它必掳掠你们； 每天早晨，它必经过， 白天与夜间都会如此。 只有恐怖的事才能使你们明白这信息。”
